Account management REST API for Triton One. Use this API to manage accounts, subscriptions, endpoints, tokens, address watch lists, and rate tiers for your Triton RPC services. Token-based authentication via the Authorization header. Distinct from RPC consumption tokens — Customers API tokens are only used against customers.triton.one.
